Home / Services / Retaining Wall Construction

Retaining Wall Construction

Building durable and functional retaining walls for OKC landscapes.

Solve erosion problems and enhance your landscape with our expertly constructed retaining walls. We specialize in designing and building retaining walls that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing. Whether you need a wall to prevent soil erosion on a sloped property or to create a tiered garden, we have the expertise to deliver a durable and long-lasting solution. We understand the unique challenges of Oklahoma's soil conditions and drainage issues, and we use proven techniques to ensure the stability and longevity of our retaining walls. We offer a variety of materials, including natural stone, concrete blocks, and timber, to complement your existing landscape.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Evaluation and Soil Analysis
  2. 02 Step 2: Design and Engineering
  3. 03 Step 3: Excavation and Foundation Preparation
  4. 04 Step 4: Wall Construction and Backfilling

Benefits

  • Erosion control
  • Increased usable space
  • Enhanced property value
  • Improved landscape aesthetics

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials are best for retaining walls in Oklahoma?

Natural stone and concrete blocks are popular choices due to their durability and resistance to weathering. We can help you choose the best material based on your budget and aesthetic preferences.

How high can a retaining wall be built without a permit?

Oklahoma City regulations typically require a permit for retaining walls over 4 feet in height. We'll handle all necessary permit applications for your project.

How do you ensure proper drainage behind a retaining wall?

We install a drainage system behind the wall to prevent water buildup and hydrostatic pressure. This typically includes a perforated pipe and gravel backfill to allow water to drain freely.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with retaining wall construction? Contact us today.
